heading: Library of Congress orders under task and delivery order contracts
label: 186 Library of Congress orders under task and delivery order contracts
notes: CodificationSection is comprised of . Subsec. (b) of amended , Public Contracts.section 142 of div. I of Pub. L. 117–103section 142 of div. I of Pub. L. 117–103section 6102 of Title 41
amendments: CodificationSection is comprised of . Subsec. (b) of amended , Public Contracts.section 142 of div. I of Pub. L. 117–103section 142 of div. I of Pub. L. 117–103section 6102 of Title 41

children.heading: Contract modifications
children.label: a Contract modifications
children.text: An order issued under a task order contract or a delivery order contract (as such terms are defined in ) entered into by the Librarian of Congress may not increase the scope, period, or maximum value of the contract under which the order is issued. The scope, period, or maximum value of the contract may be increased only by modification of the contract.section 4101 of title 41

children.label: A
children.text: is an objection on the basis that the order is in violation of subsection (a); or

children.label: B
children.text: concerns an order valued in excess of $10,000,000.

children.heading: Jurisdiction over protests
children.label: 2 Jurisdiction over protests
children.text: Notwithstanding , the Comptroller General shall have exclusive jurisdiction of a protest authorized under paragraph (1)(B).section 3556 of title 31

children.heading: Effective date
children.label: d Effective date
children.text: This section and the amendment made by this section shall apply with respect to fiscal year 2022 and each succeeding fiscal year.
